testcase.name: test_generate_cvv_exceptions[AAAAAAAA-5555555551234567-2012-220-CVK must be a double length DES key]
test_generate_cvv_exceptions[AAAAAAAABBBBBBBBCCCCCCCC-5555555551234567-2012-220-CVK must be a double length DES key]
test_key_variant_exceptions[AAAAAAA-1-Key must be a single, double or triple DES key]
test_key_variant_exceptions[AAAAAAAABBBBBBBBCCCCCCCC--1-Variant must be in the range of 0 to 31]
test_key_variant_exceptions[AAAAAAAABBBBBBBB--1-Variant must be in the range of 0 to 31]
test_key_variant_exceptions[AAAAAAAA-32-Variant must be in the range of 0 to 31]
test_generate_ibm3624_pin_exceptions[12345678-1234567890123456-0000-1122334455667788-0-16--PAN pad character must be valid hex digit]
test_generate_ibm3624_pin_exceptions[12345678-1234567890123456-0000-1122334455667788-0-16-FF-PAN pad character must be valid hex digit]
test_generate_ibm3624_pin_exceptions[12345678-1234567890123456-0000-1122334455667788-0-16-X-PAN pad character must be valid hex digit]
test_generate_ibm3624_pin_exceptions[12345678-1234567890123456-0000-1122334455667788-1-16-F-PAN verify offset and length must be within provided PAN]
test_generate_ibm3624_pin_exceptions[12345678-1234567890123456-0000-1122334455667788-0-17-F-PAN verify offset and length must be within provided PAN]
test_generate_ibm3624_offset_exceptions[12345678-1234567890123456-0000-1122334455667788-0-16--PAN pad character must be valid hex digit]
test_generate_ibm3624_offset_exceptions[12345678-1234567890123456-0000-1122334455667788-0-16-FF-PAN pad character must be valid hex digit]
test_generate_ibm3624_offset_exceptions[12345678-1234567890123456-0000-1122334455667788-0-16-X-PAN pad character must be valid hex digit]
test_generate_ibm3624_offset_exceptions[12345678-1234567890123456-0000-1122334455667788-1-16-F-PAN verify offset and length must be within provided PAN]
test_generate_ibm3624_offset_exceptions[12345678-1234567890123456-0000-1122334455667788-0-17-F-PAN verify offset and length must be within provided PAN]
test_encode_pinblock_iso_0_exception[123-55555555555555-PIN must be between 4 and 12 digits long]
test_encode_pinblock_iso_0_exception[1234567890123-55555555555555-PIN must be between 4 and 12 digits long]
test_encode_pinblock_iso_0_exception[123A-55555555555555-PIN must be between 4 and 12 digits long]
test_encode_pinblock_iso_0_exception[1234-555555555555-PAN must be at least 13 digits long]
test_encode_pinblock_iso_0_exception[1234-5555555555555A-PAN must be at least 13 digits long]
test_encode_pinblock_iso_2_exception[123-PIN must be between 4 and 12 digits long]
test_encode_pinblock_iso_2_exception[1234567890123-PIN must be between 4 and 12 digits long]
test_encode_pinblock_iso_2_exception[123A-PIN must be between 4 and 12 digits long]
test_encode_pinblock_iso_3_exception[123-55555555555555-PIN must be between 4 and 12 digits long]
test_encode_pinblock_iso_3_exception[1234567890123-55555555555555-PIN must be between 4 and 12 digits long]
test_encode_pinblock_iso_3_exception[123A-55555555555555-PIN must be between 4 and 12 digits long]
test_encode_pinblock_iso_3_exception[1234-555555555555-PAN must be at least 13 digits long]
test_encode_pinblock_iso_3_exception[1234-5555555555555A-PAN must be at least 13 digits long]
test_encode_pin_field_iso_4_exception[123-PIN must be between 4 and 12 digits long]
test_encode_pin_field_iso_4_exception[1234567890123-PIN must be between 4 and 12 digits long]
test_encode_pan_field_iso_4_exception[-PAN must be between 1 and 19 digits long.]
test_encode_pan_field_iso_4_exception[12345678901234567890-PAN must be between 1 and 19 digits long.]
test_encipher_pinblock_iso_4_exception[1111111111111111-123-55555555555555-PIN must be between 4 and 12 digits long]
test_encipher_pinblock_iso_4_exception[1111111111111111-1234567890123-55555555555555-PIN must be between 4 and 12 digits long]
test_encipher_pinblock_iso_4_exception[1111111111111111-123A-55555555555555-PIN must be between 4 and 12 digits long]
test_encipher_pinblock_iso_4_exception[1111111111111111-1234--PAN must be between 1 and 19 digits long.]
test_encipher_pinblock_iso_4_exception[1111111111111111-1234-555555555555555555555-PAN must be between 1 and 19 digits long.]
test_encipher_pinblock_iso_4_exception[1111111111111111-1234-5555555555555A-PAN must be between 1 and 19 digits long.]
test_decode_pinblock_iso_0_exception[$\x12a\xaa\xaa\xed\xcb\xa9-5555555551234567-PIN block is not ISO format 0: control field `2`]
test_decode_pinblock_iso_0_exception[\x05\x12a\xaa\xaa\xed\xcb\xa9-555555555123-PAN must be at least 13 digits long]
test_decode_pinblock_iso_0_exception[\x05\x12a\xaa\xaa\xed\xcb\xa9-5555555551234A-PAN must be at least 13 digits long]
test_decode_pinblock_iso_2_exception[\x04\x124\xff\xff\xff\xff\xff-PIN block is not ISO format 2: control field `0`]
test_decode_pinblock_iso_3_exception[$\x12a\xaa\xaa\xed\xcb\xa9-5555555551234567-PIN block is not ISO format 3: control field `2`]
test_decode_pinblock_iso_3_exception[5\x12a\xaa\xaa\xed\xcb\xa9-555555555123-PAN must be at least 13 digits long]
test_decode_pinblock_iso_3_exception[5\x12a\xaa\xaa\xed\xcb\xa9-5555555551234A-PAN must be at least 13 digits long]
test_decode_pinblock_iso_4_exception[T\x124\xaa\xaa\xaa\xaa\xaaT\x8e\xd7\xfdeIYP-PIN block is not ISO format 4: control field `5`]

test_decipher_pinblock_iso_4_exception[\xc1\xd0\xf8\xfbIXg\r\xba@\xab\x1f7R\xef\r-\xcc\x17\xf6U\x86\xbf\xd0\x950\x10"lO\xc5\xb3\xca\x00-432198765432109870-Data length (17) must be multiple of AES block size 16.]
test_decipher_pinblock_iso_4_exception[\xc1\xd0\xf8\xfbIXg\r\xba@\xab\x1f7R\xef\r-\xcc\x17\xf6U\x86\xbf\xd0\x950\x10"lO\xc5\xb3\xca-43219876543210987099-PAN must be between 1 and 19 digits long.]

test_decipher_pinblock_iso_4_exception[\xe6\x0b\x15\xb9\n\xbd\xf1L\xee3|\x97D\x0f\rn-}Z\xf4\xc36g\xa2\t\x86&\x02\x7f\xb7\xa9\xa1\xb7-4266229809609384667-PIN block is not ISO format 4: control field `3`]
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0100KS-Block KS length () is malformed. Expecting 2 hexchars.]
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0100KS1-Block KS length (1) is malformed. Expecting 2 hexchars.]
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0100KS1Y-Block KS length (1Y) is malformed. Expecting 2 hexchars.]
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0100KS02-Block KS length does not include block ID and length.]
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0100KS071-Block KS data is malformed. Received 1/3. Block data: '1']
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0100KS00-Block KS length of length () is malformed. Expecting 2 hexchars.]
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0100KS001-Block KS length of length (1) is malformed. Expecting 2 hexchars.]
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0100KS001S-Block KS length of length (1S) is malformed. Expecting 2 hexchars.]
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0100KS0000-Block KS length of length must not be 0.]
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0100KS0001-Block KS length () is malformed. Expecting 2 hexchars.]
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0100KS00010-Block KS length (0) is malformed. Expecting 2 hexchars.]
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0100KS00010H-Block KS length (0H) is malformed. Expecting 2 hexchars.]
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0100KS000101-Block KS length does not include block ID and length.]
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0100KS0001FF-Block KS data is malformed. Received 0/247. Block data: '']
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0200KS0600TT-Block TT length () is malformed. Expecting 2 hexchars.]
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0200KS050TT1-Block TT length (1) is malformed. Expecting 2 hexchars.]
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0200KS04TT1X-Block TT length (1X) is malformed. Expecting 2 hexchars.]
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0200KS04TT03-Block TT length does not include block ID and length.]
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0200KS04TT05-Block TT data is malformed. Received 0/1. Block data: '']
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0200KS04TT00-Block TT length of length () is malformed. Expecting 2 hexchars.]
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0200KS04TT001-Block TT length of length (1) is malformed. Expecting 2 hexchars.]
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0200KS04TT001S-Block TT length of length (1S) is malformed. Expecting 2 hexchars.]
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0200KS04TT0000-Block TT length of length must not be 0.]
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0200KS04TT0001-Block TT length () is malformed. Expecting 2 hexchars.]
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0200KS04TT00010-Block TT length (0) is malformed. Expecting 2 hexchars.]
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0200KS04TT00010H-Block TT length (0H) is malformed. Expecting 2 hexchars.]
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0200KS04TT000101-Block TT length does not include block ID and length.]
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0200KS04TT00011F-Block TT data is malformed. Received 0/23. Block data: '']
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0100**04-Block ID (**) is invalid. Expecting 2 alphanumeric characters.]
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0200KS0600??04-Block ID (??) is invalid. Expecting 2 alphanumeric characters.]
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0100KS05\x03-Block KS data is invalid. Expecting ASCII printable characters. Data: '\x03']
test_header_block_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0200KS04TT05\xff-Block TT data is invalid. Expecting ASCII printable characters. Data: '\xff']
test_header_load_exceptions[B0000P0TE00N0X00-Number of blocks (0X) is invalid. Expecting 2 digits.]
test_kb_wrap_exceptions[A-7-24-KBPK length (7) must be Single, Double or Triple DES for key block version A.]
test_kb_wrap_exceptions[B-7-24-KBPK length (7) must be Double or Triple DES for key block version B.]
test_kb_wrap_exceptions[C-7-24-KBPK length (7) must be Single, Double or Triple DES for key block version C.]
test_kb_wrap_exceptions[D-17-24-KBPK length (17) must be AES-128, AES-192 or AES-256 for key block version D.]
test_kb_unwrap_exceptions[16-B0040P0TE00N0000-Key block header length (40) doesn't match input data length (16).]
test_kb_unwrap_exceptions[16-BX040P0TE00N0000-Key block header length (X040) is malformed. Expecting 4 digits.]
test_kb_unwrap_exceptions[16-A0087M3TC00E000062C2C14D8785A01A9E8283525CA96F490D0CC6346FC7C2AC1E6FF354468910379AA5BBA-Key block length (87) must be multiple of 8 for key block version A.]
test_kb_unwrap_exceptions[16-B0087M3TC00E000062C2C14D8785A01A9E8283525CA96F490D0CC6346FC7C2AC1E6FF354468910379AA5BBA-Key block length (87) must be multiple of 8 for key block version B.]
test_kb_unwrap_exceptions[16-C0087M3TC00E000062C2C14D8785A01A9E8283525CA96F490D0CC6346FC7C2AC1E6FF354468910379AA5BBA-Key block length (87) must be multiple of 8 for key block version C.]
test_kb_unwrap_exceptions[16-D0087M3TC00E000062C2C14D8785A01A9E8283525CA96F490D0CC6346FC7C2AC1E6FF354468910379AA5BBA-Key block length (87) must be multiple of 16 for key block version D.]
test_kb_unwrap_exceptions[16-A0088M3TC00E000062C2C14D8785A01A9E8283525CA96F490D0CC6346FC7C2AC1E6FF354468910379AA5BBAX-Key block MAC must be valid hexchars. MAC: '9AA5BBAX']
test_kb_unwrap_exceptions[16-B0088M3TC00E000062C2C14D8785A01A9E8283525CA96F490D0CC6346FC7C2AC1E6FF354468910379AA5BBAX-Key block MAC must be valid hexchars. MAC: '468910379AA5BBAX']
test_kb_unwrap_exceptions[16-C0088M3TC00E000062C2C14D8785A01A9E8283525CA96F490D0CC6346FC7C2AC1E6FF354468910379AA5BBAX-Key block MAC must be valid hexchars. MAC: '9AA5BBAX']

test_kb_unwrap_exceptions[16-D0112P0AE00E0000DDF7B73888F22B757600010215895621B94A4E8DA57DD3E01BB66FF046A4E6B89B8F5C30BDD3A946205FDF791C3548EX-Key block MAC must be valid hexchars. MAC: '9B8F5C30BDD3A946205FDF791C3548EX']
test_kb_unwrap_exceptions[16-A0024M3TC00E0100TT04BBA6-Key block MAC is malformed. Received 4 bytes MAC. Expecting 8 bytes for key block version A. MAC: 'BBA6']
test_kb_unwrap_exceptions[16-B0024M3TC00E00009AA5BBA6-Key block MAC is malformed. Received 8 bytes MAC. Expecting 16 bytes for key block version B. MAC: '9AA5BBA6']
test_kb_unwrap_exceptions[16-C0024M3TC00E0100TT04BBA6-Key block MAC is malformed. Received 4 bytes MAC. Expecting 8 bytes for key block version C. MAC: 'BBA6']
test_kb_unwrap_exceptions[16-D0032P0AE00E0000205FDF791C3548EC-Key block MAC is malformed. Received 16 bytes MAC. Expecting 32 bytes for key block version D. MAC: '205FDF791C3548EC']

test_kb_unwrap_exceptions[16-A0088M3TC00E000062C2C14D8785A01A9E8283525CA96F490D0CC6346FC7C2AC1E6FF3544689103X9AA5BBA6-Encrypted key must be valid hexchars. Key data: '62C2C14D8785A01A9E8283525CA96F490D0CC6346FC7C2AC1E6FF3544689103X']

test_kb_unwrap_exceptions[16-B0088M3TC00E000062C2C14D8785A01A9E8283525CA96F490D0CC6346FC7C2AC1E6FF35X468910379AA5BBA6-Encrypted key must be valid hexchars. Key data: '62C2C14D8785A01A9E8283525CA96F490D0CC6346FC7C2AC1E6FF35X']

test_kb_unwrap_exceptions[16-C0088M3TC00E000062C2C14D8785A01A9E8283525CA96F490D0CC6346FC7C2AC1E6FF3544689103X9AA5BBA6-Encrypted key must be valid hexchars. Key data: '62C2C14D8785A01A9E8283525CA96F490D0CC6346FC7C2AC1E6FF3544689103X']

test_kb_unwrap_exceptions[16-D0112P0AE00E0000DDF7B73888F22B757600010215895621B94A4E8DA57DD3E01BB66FF046A4E6BX9B8F5C30BDD3A946205FDF791C3548EC-Encrypted key must be valid hexchars. Key data: 'DDF7B73888F22B757600010215895621B94A4E8DA57DD3E01BB66FF046A4E6BX']
test_kb_unwrap_exceptions[16-A0056M3TC00E0000BBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBB9AA5BBA6-Key block MAC doesn't match generated MAC.]
test_kb_unwrap_exceptions[16-B0064M3TC00E0000BBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBFFFFFFFF9AA5BBA6-Key block MAC doesn't match generated MAC.]
test_kb_unwrap_exceptions[16-C0056M3TC00E0000BBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBB9AA5BBA6-Key block MAC doesn't match generated MAC.]
test_kb_unwrap_exceptions[16-D0112P0AE00E0000DDF7B73888F22B757600010215895621B94A4E8DA57DD3E01BB66FF046A4E6B89B8F5C30BDD3A946205FDF791C3548E4-Key block MAC doesn't match generated MAC.]
test_kb_unwrap_exceptions[7-A0088M3TC00E000062C2C14D8785A01A9E8283525CA96F490D0CC6346FC7C2AC1E6FF354468910379AA5BBA6-KBPK length (7) must be Single, Double or Triple DES for key block version A.]
test_kb_unwrap_exceptions[8-B0088M3TC00E000062C2C14D8785A01A9E8283525CA96F490D0CC6346FC7C2AC1E6FF354468910379AA5BBA6-KBPK length (8) must be Double or Triple DES for key block version B.]
test_kb_unwrap_exceptions[7-C0088M3TC00E000062C2C14D8785A01A9E8283525CA96F490D0CC6346FC7C2AC1E6FF354468910379AA5BBA6-KBPK length (7) must be Single, Double or Triple DES for key block version C.]

test_kb_unwrap_exceptions[19-D0112P0AE00E0000DDF7B73888F22B757600010215895621B94A4E8DA57DD3E01BB66FF046A4E6B89B8F5C30BDD3A946205FDF791C3548E4-KBPK length (19) must be AES-128, AES-192 or AES-256 for key block version D.]
